list.name: trade_id
list.label: Trade
list.query: SELECT to_char(trade_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' #' || id || ' ' || status || ' ' || direction || ' ' || center_strike::text || 'w' || wing_width::text || ' P&L ' || COALESCE(ROUND(pnl::numeric, 2)::text, 'open') AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' ORDER BY entry_time DESC LIMIT 250
list.definition: SELECT to_char(trade_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' #' || id || ' ' || status || ' ' || direction || ' ' || center_strike::text || 'w' || wing_width::text || ' P&L ' || COALESCE(ROUND(pnl::numeric, 2)::text, 'open') AS __text, id::text AS __value FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' ORDER BY entry_time DESC LIMIT 250

targets.rawSql: SELECT id AS trade_id, underlying, trade_date, status, direction, lower_strike::float AS lower_strike, center_strike::float AS center_strike, upper_strike::float AS upper_strike, wing_width, entry_time, exit_time, entry_price::float AS entry_price, exit_price::float AS exit_price, pnl::float AS pnl, peak_value::float AS peak_value, exit_reason, quantity, (metadata->>'entry_spot')::float AS entry_spot, (metadata->>'vix')::float AS vix, metadata->>'selection_method' AS selection_method, lower_symbol, center_symbol, upper_symbol FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND id = $trade_id

WITH trade AS (SELECT entry_time, COALESCE(exit_time, NOW()) AS end_time FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND id = $trade_id) SELECT sp.ts AS time, sp.price::float AS "$underlying Spot" FROM spot_prices sp, trade t WHERE sp.underlying = '$underlying' AND sp.ts BETWEEN t.entry_time - interval '10 minutes' AND t.end_time + interval '10 minutes' ORDER BY sp.ts

WITH trade AS (SELECT entry_time, COALESCE(exit_time, NOW()) AS end_time, center_strike, lower_strike + entry_price AS lower_be, upper_strike - entry_price AS upper_be FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND id = $trade_id) SELECT sp.ts AS time, t.center_strike::float AS "Center", t.lower_be::float AS "Lower BE", t.upper_be::float AS "Upper BE" FROM spot_prices sp, trade t WHERE sp.underlying = '$underlying' AND sp.ts BETWEEN t.entry_time - interval '10 minutes' AND t.end_time + interval '10 minutes' ORDER BY sp.ts

SELECT t.entry_time AS time, sp.price::float AS "Entry" FROM butterfly_trades t CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT price FROM spot_prices WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND ts <= t.entry_time ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) sp WHERE t.underlying = '$underlying' AND t.id = $trade_id

SELECT t.exit_time AS time, sp.price::float AS "Exit" FROM butterfly_trades t CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT price FROM spot_prices WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND ts <= t.exit_time ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) sp WHERE t.underlying = '$underlying' AND t.id = $trade_id AND t.exit_time IS NOT NULL

SELECT ts AS time, NULLIF(data->>'mark_value', '')::float AS "Mark", NULLIF(data->>'peak_value', '')::float AS "Peak", NULLIF(data->>'drawdown_pct', '')::float AS "Drawdown %" FROM decision_log WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND data->>'trade_id' = '$trade_id' AND event_type IN ('profit_state_transition', 'exit_signal_fired', 'trade_exited') ORDER BY ts

SELECT ts AS time, event_type, COALESCE(data->>'from', '') AS from_state, COALESCE(data->>'to', '') AS to_state, COALESCE(data->>'reason', data->>'exit_reason', '') AS reason, NULLIF(data->>'mark_value', '')::float AS mark_value, NULLIF(data->>'peak_value', '')::float AS peak_value, NULLIF(data->>'drawdown_pct', '')::float AS drawdown_pct, NULLIF(data->>'pnl', '')::float AS pnl FROM decision_log WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND data->>'trade_id' = '$trade_id' AND event_type IN ('profit_state_transition', 'exit_signal_fired', 'trade_exited', 'exit_order_failed') ORDER BY ts

WITH trade AS (SELECT * FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND id = $trade_id), payload AS (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(t.metadata->'entry_attempts', 'null'::jsonb), dl.data->'entry_attempts', '[]'::jsonb) AS attempts FROM trade t LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT data FROM decision_log WHERE underlying = t.underlying AND event_type = 'entry_ladder_trace' AND data->>'trade_id' = t.id::text ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) dl ON TRUE) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e->>'step', '')::int, ord - 1) AS step, NULLIF(e->>'limit', '')::float AS limit, NULLIF(e->>'bid', '')::float AS bid, NULLIF(e->>'mark', '')::float AS mark, NULLIF(e->>'ask', '')::float AS ask, NULLIF(e->>'center', '')::float AS center, NULLIF(e->>'width', '')::int AS width, NULLIF(e->>'reward_risk', '')::float AS reward_risk FROM payload, jsonb_array_elements(attempts) WITH ORDINALITY AS arr(e, ord) ORDER BY step

WITH trade AS (SELECT * FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND id = $trade_id), payload AS (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(t.metadata->'exit_ladder_steps', 'null'::jsonb), dl.data->'exit_ladder_steps', '[]'::jsonb) AS steps FROM trade t LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT data FROM decision_log WHERE underlying = t.underlying AND event_type = 'exit_ladder_trace' AND data->>'trade_id' = t.id::text ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1) dl ON TRUE) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(e->>'step', '')::int, ord - 1) AS step, NULLIF(e->>'limit', '')::float AS limit, NULLIF(e->>'bid', '')::float AS bid, NULLIF(e->>'mark', '')::float AS mark, NULLIF(e->>'ask', '')::float AS ask, COALESCE(NULLIF(e->>'filled', '')::boolean, false) AS filled FROM payload, jsonb_array_elements(steps) WITH ORDINALITY AS arr(e, ord) ORDER BY step

WITH trade AS (SELECT * FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND id = $trade_id) SELECT c.scan_time AS time, c.direction, c.wing_width AS width, c.center_strike::float AS center, c.lower_strike::float AS lower_strike, c.upper_strike::float AS upper_strike, c.cost::float AS cost, c.max_profit::float AS max_profit, c.reward_risk::float AS reward_risk, c.lower_be::float AS lower_be, c.upper_be::float AS upper_be, c.distance_from_spot::float AS distance_from_spot, c.spot_price::float AS spot_price, (c.selected OR (c.center_strike = t.center_strike AND c.wing_width = t.wing_width AND c.direction = t.direction)) AS selected_match FROM butterfly_candidates c JOIN trade t ON c.underlying = t.underlying WHERE c.scan_time BETWEEN t.entry_time - interval '10 minutes' AND t.entry_time + interval '5 minutes' AND c.direction = t.direction ORDER BY selected_match DESC, c.scan_time DESC, c.reward_risk DESC LIMIT 100

WITH trade AS (SELECT entry_time, COALESCE(exit_time, NOW()) AS end_time FROM butterfly_trades WHERE underlying = '$underlying' AND id = $trade_id) SELECT d.ts AS time, d.event_type, CASE d.event_type WHEN 'trade_entered' THEN 'fill=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'cost', '?') || ' width=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'width', '?') || ' center=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'center', '?') || ' direction=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'direction', '?') WHEN 'entry_ladder_trace' THEN 'entry attempts=' || COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(d.data->'entry_attempts')::text, '0') || ' method=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'selection_method', '?') WHEN 'profit_state_transition' THEN COALESCE(d.data->>'from', 'null') || ' -> ' || COALESCE(d.data->>'to', '?') || ' mark=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'mark_value', '?') || ' peak=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'peak_value', '?') WHEN 'exit_signal_fired' THEN 'reason=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'reason', '?') || ' mark=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'mark_value', '?') || ' peak=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'peak_value', '?') || ' drawdown=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'drawdown_pct', '?') || '%' WHEN 'trade_exited' THEN 'reason=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'exit_reason', '?') || ' fill=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'fill_price', '?') || ' pnl=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'pnl', '?') WHEN 'exit_ladder_trace' THEN 'exit steps=' || COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(d.data->'exit_ladder_steps')::text, '0') || ' forced=' || COALESCE(d.data->>'forced', 'false') ELSE d.data::text END AS details, d.data::text AS raw_json FROM decision_log d CROSS JOIN trade t WHERE d.underlying = '$underlying' AND ((d.data->>'trade_id') = '$trade_id' OR (d.ts BETWEEN t.entry_time - interval '10 minutes' AND t.end_time + interval '10 minutes' AND d.event_type IN ('entry_blocked', 'gap_regime_skip', 'bias_filter_no_signal', 'no_candidates', 'entry_step_unfilled', 'entry_exhausted'))) ORDER BY d.ts
